summary: Tested all 8 game types, game interactivity features (timer, sounds, progress saving), and refactored modular routes. Fixed critical bug in route dependency injection that was causing 520 errors.
seed_data_creation: Created test games for all 8 game types: quiz, flashcards, matching, fill_blanks, true_false, word_search, crossword, drag_drop
context_for_next_testing_agent: All game types and refactored routes are working. Fixed dependency injection bug in modular routes.

route_dependency_injection.issue: Routes were using Depends(lambda: get_current_user) which returned the function object instead of calling it
route_dependency_injection.fix: Changed to use a wrapper function that properly calls the auth dependency

game_types.quiz: PASS - Multiple choice questions with options A, B, C, D
game_types.flashcards: PASS - Flip animation, Got it/Didn't know buttons
game_types.matching: PASS - Two-column matching with term/definition pairs
game_types.word_search: PASS - 12x12 grid generation with clickable cells
game_types.crossword: PASS - Input fields for across/down clues
game_types.drag_drop: PASS - Drag reordering with shuffle button

game_interactivity.sound_effects: PASS - Web Audio API oscillators for correct/wrong/click/complete/flip sounds
game_interactivity.game_timer: PASS - Timer displays and counts during gameplay (format: MM:SS)
game_interactivity.streak_counter: PASS - Streak increments on consecutive correct answers, bestStreak tracked
game_interactivity.confetti_animation: PASS - Confetti animation on game completion

api_endpoints_verified: POST /api/games/save - Save game with all 8 types

games_creator_page: All 8 game types displayed in sidebar
game_playing_ui: Multiple choice options with A, B, C, D labels
saved_games_library: Game cards with title, question count
